top_gap_prompt: What is the best HR for mid-market companies building high-performance cultures?
category_long: performance management and people development platform for growing teams

gaps.title: Thin or missing dedicated competitor-comparison pages
gaps.description: Lattice lacks depth on '[brand] vs [competitor]' comparison pages, making it less likely to appear when AI models answer alternative/comparison queries.

gaps.title: No Organization or SoftwareApplication schema on homepage
gaps.description: Lattice's homepage lacks structured data (schema.org/Organization or SoftwareApplication), reducing the chance AI models pull a rich product snippet when answering category-discovery queries.

gaps.title: Low placement frequency in 'best [category] tools' roundups
gaps.description: Lattice is under-represented in third-party 'best HR' listicles and review articles. AI models heavily weight these sources in category-discovery responses.

gap_prompts.prompt_text: What is the best HR for mid-market companies building high-performance cultures?
gap_prompts.why_it_matters: Discovery queries drive early-funnel awareness. Buyers use these to find solutions to problems they haven't yet named. Missing here means you're invisible before the consideration stage.

gap_prompts.prompt_text: Best way to develop employee skills and track engagement scores over time for a mid-market companies building high-performance cultures team
gap_prompts.why_it_matters: Use-case prompts reach buyers at the exact moment they need your solution. These are the highest-converting prompt type in AI search.

gap_prompts.prompt_text: Which HR software should a Head of People or VP HR at a growth-stage company use?
gap_prompts.why_it_matters: Discovery queries drive early-funnel awareness. Buyers use these to find solutions to problems they haven't yet named. Missing here means you're invisible before the consideration stage.
